input.new_string:
func test_openSajuTab_routesToSajuTab_andStaysAfterSplash() {
        let app = XCUIApplication()
        app.launchArguments = ["-resetOnboarding", "-openSajuTab"]
        app.launch()

        let sajuRoot = app.otherElements["SajuTabRoot"]
        XCTAssertTrue(sajuRoot.waitForExistence(timeout: 3),
                      "SajuTabRoot should appear after launch with -openSajuTab")

        waitPastSplash()

        XCTAssertTrue(sajuRoot.exists,
                      "SajuTabRoot must remain after splash; splash callback overrode launch-arg route")
        XCTAssertFalse(app.otherElements["OnboardingRoot"].exists,
                       "OnboardingRoot must not appear when -openSajuTab was supplied")
    }

payload.text:
Summary of work:
- Models: `Pillar`, `SajuRoute` (7 cases), `SajuCourse`, `WeeklyProgress`, `SajuCategorySummary`.
- 6 DI protocols + Mock implementations + `SajuTabDependencies` ObservableObject (with `static let mock`).
- UI: `SajuTabHeaderView`, `SajuTabContentPlaceholderView`, `SajuRouteDestinations`, `SajuTabView` (per-tab `NavigationStack`, hidden NavPush trigger buttons).
- App-level: `MainTabContainerView` with 4 tabs (`-openSajuTab` → tab 2).
- Wiring: `WoontechApp` injects `SajuTabDependencies.mock`; `RootView.home` mounts `MainTabContainerView`; `applyLaunchArgs` honors `-openSajuTab`.
- Cleanup: removed legacy `HomeTabBarPlaceholderView` from `HomeDashboardView`; scoped its outer accessibility container with `.accessibilityElement(children: .contain)`.
- Localization keys added for the saju tab.
- pbxproj registered all 17 new files (12 app sources, 3 unit-test, 1 UI-test, 1 main-tab-container) into the proper groups + sources build phases.
- Tests written: 12 unit tests (3 classes), 17 UI tests (`SajuTabFoundationUITests`), and one new `AppLaunchContractUITests.test_openSajuTab_routesToSajuTab_andStaysAfterSplash`.
- Verification: `python3 tools/xcode_test_runner.py build` succeeds (BUILD SUCCEEDED). Unit tests: 12/12 passed (per xcresult summary).

Identifier scope notes (per UI-test contract):
- `SajuTabRoot` is attached to a hidden `Color.clear` overlay inside `SajuTabView`'s body — queried via `app.otherElements["SajuTabRoot"]`. The outer `VStack` of `SajuTabView` (the `TabView` child) carries no identifier so descendant `SajuNavPush_*` button identifiers and `SajuTabHeaderTitle/MenuButton` identifiers are not shadowed.
- Tab bar buttons are queried via `app.tabBars.buttons["사주 탭"]` / `["홈"]` (system tab bar buttons), using accessibilityLabel set on each `tabItem`'s child. No custom identifier on tab children.
- `SajuTabContentPlaceholder` lives on a `ScrollView` and is queried via `app.scrollViews["SajuTabContentPlaceholder"]` if needed; the visible "준비중" text uses `SajuTabContentPlaceholderText` on a `staticText`.
- `SajuPlaceholderDestination_<route>` containers use `accessibilityElement(children: .contain)` so the inner `_Identifier` text remains queryable.
- `HomeDashboardRoot` keeps its identifier on the `HomeDashboardView` outer VStack but with `.accessibilityElement(children: .contain)` added so descendant identifiers (`HomeBellButton`, `HomeAvatarButton`, `HomeNavPush*`, `HomeDashboardContent`, etc.) remain unshadowed when nested in the new `TabView`.
